name: Null Reference Error Diagnosis
description: Agent must diagnose and fix a null reference error using systematic debugging methodology

input.task: Debug and fix: TypeError - Cannot read property 'name' of null in getUserName(user) function
input.expectedError: TypeError: Cannot read property 'profile' of null

expectedBehavior: Identify the null reference point (user parameter)
Trace the call stack to understand how null was passed
Determine whether null is a valid input or a caller error
Implement defensive check: validate user exists before accessing properties
Consider error message clarity for debugging future issues
Test with both null and valid user objects
